usesAbroadPayment.description: UsesAbroadPayment field. Determines if we should use domestic or abroad remittance. To be able to use abroad remittance, one has to: 1: have Autopay 2

userType.description:
Define the employee's user type.
STANDARD: Reduced access. Users with limited system entitlements.
EXTENDED: Users can be given all system entit

allowInformationRegistration.description: Determines if salary information can be registered on the user including hours, travel expenses and employee expenses. The user may also be selected a

isContact.description: Determines if the employee is a contact (external) in the company.

isProxy.description: True if this Employee object represents an accounting or auditor office

isSupplier.description: Defines if the customer is also a supplier.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue

singleCustomerInvoice.description: Enables various orders on one customer invoice.

invoiceSendMethod.description:
Define the invoicing method for the customer.
EMAIL: Send invoices as email.
EHF: Send invoices as EHF.
EFAKTURA: Send invoices as EFAKTURA.<

emailAttachmentType.description:
Define the invoice attachment type for emailing to the customer.
LINK: Send invoice as link in email.
ATTACHMENT: Send invoice as attachment in

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this customer is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this c

isFactoring.description: If true; send this customers invoices to factoring (if factoring is turned on in account).

invoiceSMSNotificationNumber.description: Send SMS-notification to this number. Must be a norwegian phone number

isAutomaticSoftReminderEnabled.description: Has automatic soft reminders enabled for this customer.

isAutomaticReminderEnabled.description: Has automatic reminders enabled for this customer.

isAutomaticNoticeOfDebtCollectionEnabled.description: Has automatic notice of debt collection enabled for this customer.

discountPercentage.description: Default discount percentage for this customer.

costExcludingVatCurrency.description: Price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the product's currency

priceExcludingVatCurrency.description: Price of purchase excluding VAT in the product's currency

priceIncludingVatCurrency.description: Price of purchase including VAT in the product's currency

isDeletable.description: For performance reasons, field is deprecated and it will always return false.

isRoundPriceIncVat.description: [BETA] Indicates whether the price incl. VAT is rounded off or not

priceInTargetCurrency.description: Purchase Price converted in specific currency.

purchasePriceCurrency.description: Purchase Price in product currency. This affects only Supplier Products.

minStockLevel.description: Minimum available stock level for the product. Applicable only to stock items in the Logistics Basics module.

invoiceNumber.description: If value is set to 0, the invoice number will be generated.

creditedInvoice.description: The id of the original invoice if this is a credit note.

invoiceComment.description: Comment text for the invoice. This was specified on the order as invoiceComment.

comment.description: Comment text for the specific invoice.

orders.description: Related orders. Only one order per invoice is supported at the moment.

travelReports.description: Travel reports connected to the invoice.

projectInvoiceDetails.description: ProjectInvoiceDetails contains additional information about the invoice, in particular invoices for projects. It contains information about the charge

amount.description: In the company’s currency, typically NOK.

amountExcludingVatCurrency.description: Amount excluding VAT in the specified currency.

amountRoundoff.description: Amount of round off to nearest integer.

amountRoundoffCurrency.description: Amount of round off to nearest integer in the specified currency.

amountOutstanding.description: The amount outstanding based on the history collection, excluding reminders and any existing remits, in the invoice currency.

amountCurrencyOutstanding.description: The amountCurrency outstanding based on the history collection, excluding reminders and any existing remits, in the invoice currency.

amountOutstandingTotal.description: The amount outstanding based on the history collection and including the last reminder and any existing remits. This is the total invoice balance incl

amountCurrencyOutstandingTotal.description: The amountCurrency outstanding based on the history collection and including the last reminder and any existing remits. This is the total invoice bala

sumRemits.description: The sum of all open remittances of the invoice. Remittances are reimbursement payments back to the customer and are therefore relevant to the bookkeep

postings.description: The invoice postings, which includes a posting for the invoice with a positive amount, and one or more posting for the payments with negative amounts.

invoiceRemarks.description: Deprecated Invoice remarks - please use the 'invoiceRemark' instead.

paymentTypeId.description: [BETA] Optional. Used to specify payment type for prepaid invoices. Payment type can be specified here, or as a parameter to the /invoice API endpoint

paidAmount.description: [BETA] Optional. Used to specify the prepaid amount of the invoice. The paid amount can be specified here, or as a parameter to the /invoice API endpo

ehfSendStatus.description: [Deprecated] EHF (Peppol) send status. This only shows status for historic EHFs.

invoiceComment.description: Comment to be displayed in the invoice based on this order. Can be also found in Invoice.invoiceComment on Invoice objects.

internalComment.description: Internal comment to be displayed in order.

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this order is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this c

isShowOpenPostsOnInvoices.description: Show account statement - open posts on invoices created from this order

isClosed.description: Denotes if this order is closed. A closed order can no longer be invoiced unless it is opened again.

orderLines.description: Order lines tied to the order. New OrderLines may be embedded here, in some endpoints.

isSubscription.description: If true, the order is a subscription, which enables periodical invoicing of order lines. First, create an order with isSubscription=true, then approve

subscriptionDuration.description: Number of months/years the subscription shall run

subscriptionPeriodsOnInvoice.description: Number of periods on each invoice

subscriptionInvoicingTime.description: Number of days/months invoicing in advance/in arrears

isSubscriptionAutoInvoicing.description: Automatic invoicing. Starts when the subscription is approved

sendMethodDescription.description: Description of how this invoice will be sent

invoiceOnAccountVatHigh.description: Is the on account(a konto) amounts including vat

invoiceSMSNotificationNumber.description: The phone number of the receiver of sms notifications. Must be a norwegian phone number

discountPercentage.description: Default discount percentage for order lines.

travelReports.description: Travel reports connected to the order.

accountingDimensionValues.description: Free dimensions for the project connected to the order.

unitCostCurrency.description: Unit price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the order's currency

unitPriceExcludingVatCurrency.description: Unit price of purchase excluding VAT in the order's currency. If only unit price Excl. VAT or unit price Inc. VAT is supplied, we will calculate and u

amountExcludingVatCurrency.description: Total amount on order line excluding VAT in the order's currency

amountIncludingVatCurrency.description: Total amount on order line including VAT in the order's currency

unitPriceIncludingVatCurrency.description: Unit price of purchase including VAT in the order's currency. If only unit price Excl. VAT or unit price Inc. VAT is supplied, we will calculate and u

sortIndex.description: Defines the presentation order of the lines. Does not need to be, and is often not continuous. Only applicable if parent order has orderLineSorting as

isPicked.description: Only used for Logistics customers who activated the available inventory functionality. Represents whether the line has been picked up or not.

pickedDate.description: Only used for Logistics customers who activated the available inventory functionality. Represents the pick date for an order line or null if the line

orderedQuantity.description: Only used for Logistics customers who activated the Backorder functionality. Represents the quantity that was ordered. If nothing is specified, the or

isCharged.description: Flag indicating whether the order line is charged or not.

perDiemCompensations.description: Link to individual per diem compensations.

number.description: If NULL, a number is generated automatically.

isOffer.description: If is Project Offer set to true, if is Project set to false. The default value is false.

isFixedPrice.description: Project is fixed price if set to true, hourly rate if set to false.

displayNameFormat.description: Defines project name presentation in overviews.

fixedprice.description: Fixed price amount, in the project's currency.

orderLines.description: Order lines tied to the order

isPriceCeiling.description: Set to true if an hourly rate project has a price ceiling.

priceCeilingAmount.description: Price ceiling amount, in the project's currency.

projectHourlyRates.description: Project Rate Types tied to the project.

forParticipantsOnly.description: Set to true if only project participants can register information on the project

invoicingPlan.description: Invoicing plans tied to the project

generalProjectActivitiesPerProjectOnly.description: Set to true if a general project activity must be linked to project to allow time tracking.

invoiceDueDateType.description: Set the time unit of invoiceDueDate. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this

invoiceReceiverEmail.description: Set the project's invoice receiver email. Will override the default invoice receiver email of any customer that may also be set in the request body.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: Set the project's overdue notice email. Will override the default overdue notice email of any customer that may also be set in the request body.

invoiceOnAccountVatHigh.description: The on account(a konto) amounts including VAT

accountingDimensionValues.description: [BETA - Requires pilot feature] Free dimensions for the project.

businessActivityTypeId.description: The business activity type for this department. Business activity types can be used to separate between different tax categories, and between general

isCustomer.description: Determine if the supplier is also a customer

bankAccounts.description: [DEPRECATED] List of the bank account numbers for this supplier. Norwegian bank account numbers only.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue

bankAccountPresentation.description: List of bankAccount for this supplier

companyMigration.description: If the company was migrated from another system, this field will contain the name of the system it was migrated from.

number.description: System generated number that cannot be changed.

year.description: System generated number that cannot be changed.

supplierVoucherType.description: Supplier voucher type - simple and detailed.

amortizationStartDate.description: Amortization start date. AmortizationAccountId, amortizationStartDate and amortizationEndDate should be provided.

externalRef.description: External reference for identifying payment basis of the posting, e.g., KID, customer identification or credit note number.

quantityAmount1.description: The quantity amount associated with the posting

quantityAmount2.description: The quantity amount associated with the posting

isAmountVatClosed.description: Is amount of this posting (for VAT purposes) changeable

postingRuleId.description: The payment type id associated with the posting. This ID will only be set if the payment types used is an internal payment type like 'Nettbank' - it i

legalVatTypes.description: List of legal vat types for this account.

ledgerType.description: Supported ledger types, default is GENERAL. Only available for customers with the module multiple ledgers.

balanceGroup.description: The balance group for this account.

vatLocked.description: True if all entries on this account must have the vat type given by vatType.

isCloseable.description: True if it should be possible to close entries on this account and it is possible to filter on open entries.

isApplicableForSupplierInvoice.description: True if this account is applicable for supplier invoice registration.

requireReconciliation.description: True if this account must be reconciled before the accounting period closure.

isInactive.description: Inactive accounts will not show up in UI lists.

saftCode.description: SAF-T 1.0 standard account ID for account. It will be given a default value based on account number if empty.

groupingCode.description: SAF-T 1.3 groupingCode for the account. It will be given a default value based on account number if empty.

requiresDepartment.description: Posting against this account requires department.

requiresProject.description: Posting against this account requires project.

travelExpenseZoneId.description: Optional travel expense zone id. If not specified, the value from field zone will be used.

overnightAccommodation.description: Set what sort of accommodation was had overnight.

vehicleType.description: The corresponded number for the vehicleType. Default value = 0.

sequence.description: Defines the priority of order, when displayed in a list with order payment types

deductionPercentage.description: Percentage of the VAT amount that is deducted. Always 100% for all predefined VAT types, but can be lower for custom types for relative VAT.

activityType.description: PROJECT_SPECIFIC_ACTIVITY are made via project/projectActivity, as they must be part of a project.

isoAlpha2Code.description: The ISO 3166-1 Alpha2 code of the country (2 letters). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1

isoAlpha3Code.description: The ISO 3166-1 Alpha3 code of the country (3 letters). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1

isoNumericCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 numeric code of the country (3 digits). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1

statusId.description: The payment status Id. Usually all the payments in one batch have the same status ID, at least to the point of being received by bank.NEW: Payment is

amountInAccountCurrency.description: Amount specified in the currency of the bank agreements account.

isDisabledForUpdate.description: Can this payment date be changed.

isDisabledForAmountChange.description: Can this payment amount be changed.

isDueDateUpdatable.description: Can this payment due date be changed.

numberOfApprovedInBank.description: Number of how many times this transaction has been approved in nettbank

numberOfApprovers.description: Number of approvers required for this transaction. Ztl only!

urlForVoucher.description: The url to access the connected invoice/wage period transaction/vat returns/wage transaction.

isSalaryDateInvalid.description: Is the due date invalid, if this is a salary payment.

receiverLink.description: The payment receiver link or name.
